info.title: HipChat API
info.description: HipChat REST API v2 by Atlassian. HipChat was a team messaging and collaboration platform. The service was deprecated and shut down on February 15, 2019, with Atlassian recommending migration to Slack. This spec is reconstructed from archived documentation and open-source client libraries.

get.description: List non-archived rooms for this group.

parameters.name: start-index
parameters.description: The start index for the result set.

id.description: The ID of the created room.

delete.description: Deletes a room and kicks the current participants.

post.description: Send a message to a room as a notification.
Send a message to a room.

get.description: Fetch chat history for a room.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Either the latest date to fetch history for in ISO-8601 format, or 'recent' to fetch the latest 75 messages.

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Your timezone, used for date-based filtering.

parameters.name: reverse
parameters.description: Reverse the natural order of the chat history.

get.description: Fetch latest chat history for this room.

parameters.name: not-before
parameters.description: The ID of the message that is oldest in the set of messages to be returned.

put.description: Set the topic for a room.

post.description: Invite a user to a room.

put.description: Add a member to a private room.

delete.description: Remove a member from a private room.

post.description: Share a file with the room.

message.description: An optional message to accompany the file.

get.description: Gets all webhooks for this room.

post.description: Update a glance metadata in a room.

delete.description: Delete a glance from a room.

get.description: List all users in the group.

post.description: Send a user a private message.
Share a file with a user via private message.

message.description: An optional message to accompany the file.

get.description: Gets all emoticons for the current group.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of emoticons to get.

parameters.name: emoticon_id_or_shortcut
parameters.description: The emoticon ID or shortcut name.

get.description: Gets the capabilities descriptor for HipChat.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 Bearer token or personal access token. Tokens can also be passed as the auth_token query parameter.

roomIdOrName.name: room_id_or_name
roomIdOrName.description: The ID or URL-encoded name of the room.

userIdOrEmail.name: user_id_or_email
userIdOrEmail.description: The ID, email address, or mention name (beginning with @) of the user.

BadRequest.description: The request body or parameters are invalid.

is_guest_accessible.description: Whether guests can access this room.

guest_access.description: Whether or not to enable guest access.

owner_user_id.description: The ID, email, or mention name of the room's owner.

notify.description: Whether to trigger a user notification.

message_format.description: Determines how the message is treated by the server.

from.description: A label to be shown in addition to the sender's name.

id.description: An ID that identifies this card.

from.description: The sender. Can be a user object or a string for API/notification messages.

event.description: The event this webhook listens for.

pattern.description: The regex pattern to match against messages.

url.description: The URL to send the webhook POST to.

pattern.description: A regular expression pattern to match against the message body.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management and private messaging operations.
